{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Fix 1: Set Coding hierarchyLevel to 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding: {result}\")\n\n# Fix 2: Set CollectiveKnowledge hierarchy fields \nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CollectiveKnowledge: {result}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}
```

  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Fix 1: Set Coding hierarchyLevel to 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding: {result}\")\n\n# Fix 2: Set CollectiveKnowledge hierarchy fields \nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CollectiveKnowledge: {result}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Fix 1: Set Coding hierarchyLevel to 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding: {result}\")\n\n# Fix 2: Set CollectiveKnowledge hierarchy fields \nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CollectiveKnowledge: {result}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}
```

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Fix 1: Set Coding hierarchyLevel to 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding: {result}\")\n\n# Fix 2: Set CollectiveKnowledge hierarchy fields \nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CollectiveKnowledge: {result}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}
```

CollectiveKnowledge: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Fix 1: Set Coding hierarchyLevel to 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding: {result}\")\n\n# Fix 2: Set CollectiveKnowledge hierarchy fields \nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CollectiveKnowledge: {result}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Fix 1: Set Coding hierarchyLevel to 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding: {result}\")\n\n# Fix 2: Set CollectiveKnowledge hierarchy fields \nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CollectiveKnowledge: {result}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Fix 1: Set Coding hierarchyLevel to 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding: {result}\")\n\n# Fix 2: Set CollectiveKnowledge hierarchy fields \nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CollectiveKnowledge: {result}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}
```

  "command": "pkill -f \"vkb-server\" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1\n# Restart with debugging to see what happens\nNODE_DEBUG=graphdb node lib/vkb-server/server.js &>/tmp/vkb-server.log &\nsleep 3\n\n# Try the update\npython3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel = 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back immediately\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Coding read-back: L={e.get('hierarchyLevel')} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')} children={e.get('childEntityNames')}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Debug hierarchy persistence on Coding entity"
}
```

  "command": "pkill -f \"vkb-server\" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1\n# Restart with debugging to see what happens\nNODE_DEBUG=graphdb node lib/vkb-server/server.js &>/tmp/vkb-server.log &\nsleep 3\n\n# Try the update\npython3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel = 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back immediately\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Coding read-back: L={e.get('hierarchyLevel')} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')} children={e.get('childEntityNames')}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Debug hierarchy persistence on Coding entity"
}
```

  "command": "pkill -f \"vkb-server\" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1\n# Restart with debugging to see what happens\nNODE_DEBUG=graphdb node lib/vkb-server/server.js &>/tmp/vkb-server.log &\nsleep 3\n\n# Try the update\npython3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel = 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back immediately\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Coding read-back: L={e.get('hierarchyLevel')} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')} children={e.get('childEntityNames')}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Debug hierarchy persistence on Coding entity"
}

}

  "command": "pkill -f \"vkb-server\" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1\n# Restart with debugging to see what happens\nNODE_DEBUG=graphdb node lib/vkb-server/server.js &>/tmp/vkb-server.log &\nsleep 3\n\n# Try the update\npython3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel = 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back immediately\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Coding read-back: L={e.get('hierarchyLevel')} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')} children={e.get('childEntityNames')}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Debug hierarchy persistence on Coding entity"
}
```

  "command": "pkill -f \"vkb-server\" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1\n# Restart with debugging to see what happens\nNODE_DEBUG=graphdb node lib/vkb-server/server.js &>/tmp/vkb-server.log &\nsleep 3\n\n# Try the update\npython3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel = 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back immediately\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Coding read-back: L={e.get('hierarchyLevel')} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')} children={e.get('childEntityNames')}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Debug hierarchy persistence on Coding entity"
}
```

  "command": "pkill -f \"vkb-server\" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1\n# Restart with debugging to see what happens\nNODE_DEBUG=graphdb node lib/vkb-server/server.js &>/tmp/vkb-server.log &\nsleep 3\n\n# Try the update\npython3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel = 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back immediately\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Coding read-back: L={e.get('hierarchyLevel')} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')} children={e.get('childEntityNames')}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Debug hierarchy persistence on Coding entity"
}
```

}

{
  "command": "pkill -f \"vkb-server\" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1\n# Restart with debugging to see what happens\nNODE_DEBUG=graphdb node lib/vkb-server/server.js &>/tmp/vkb-server.log &\nsleep 3\n\n# Try the update\npython3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel = 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back immediately\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Coding read-back: L={e.get('hierarchyLevel')} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')} children={e.get('childEntityNames')}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Debug hierarchy persistence on Coding entity"
}

{
  "command": "pkill -f \"vkb-server\" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1\n# Restart with debugging to see what happens\nNODE_DEBUG=graphdb node lib/vkb-server/server.js &>/tmp/vkb-server.log &\nsleep 3\n\n# Try the update\npython3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel = 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back immediately\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Coding read-back: L={e.get('hierarchyLevel')} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')} children={e.get('childEntityNames')}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",

}

  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Fix 1: Set Coding hierarchyLevel to 0\ncoding_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=coding_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding: {result}\")\n\n# Fix 2: Set CollectiveKnowledge hierarchy fields \nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CollectiveKnowledge: {result}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}
```

  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}
```

}

  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}

  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}

  "description": "Update Coding and CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchy fields"
}

  "new_string": "      // Check if content has actually changed (exclude timestamps from comparison)\n      const contentChanged = this._hasContentChanged(existingAttrs, attributes);\n\n      if (!contentChanged) {\n        // Skip update entirely if no content change - don't mark dirty, don't emit event\n        return nodeId;\n      }\n\n      // Merge attributes instead of full replace - preserve created_at\n      // Only update last_modified if content actually changed\n      const mergedAttributes = {\n        ...existingAttrs,\n        ...attributes,\n        created_at: existingAttrs.created_at || attributes.created_at, // Preserve original creation date\n        last_modified: new Date().toISOString()\n      };"

}

}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

}

}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Test with hierarchyLevel=99 (obviously wrong but diagnostic)\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 99\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test with non-zero hierarchyLevel value"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
hierarchyLevel=99
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

}

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Test with hierarchyLevel=99 (obviously wrong but diagnostic)\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 99\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test with non-zero hierarchyLevel value"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
hierarchyLevel=99
```

**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel=99
Step 2 PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel=None
```

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel=99
Step 2 PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel=None
```

{

  "description": "Test with non-zero hierarchyLevel value"
}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Test with hierarchyLevel=99 (obviously wrong but diagnostic)\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 99\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test with non-zero hierarchyLevel value"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
hierarchyLevel=99
```

}

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel=99
Step 2 PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel=None
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Test with hierarchyLevel=99 (obviously wrong but diagnostic)\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 99\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test with non-zero hierarchyLevel value"
}
```

hierarchyLevel=99
```

}

  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel=99
Step 2 PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel=None
```

}

}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Test with hierarchyLevel=99 (obviously wrong but diagnostic)\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 99\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test with non-zero hierarchyLevel value"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
hierarchyLevel=99
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Test with hierarchyLevel=99 (obviously wrong but diagnostic)\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 99\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq2 = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req2) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test with non-zero hierarchyLevel value"
}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}

  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
CK PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}
  CollectiveKnowledge: L=-1 parent=None children=['Coding']
  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']
```

}

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
CK PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}
  CollectiveKnowledge: L=-1 parent=None children=['Coding']
  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']
```

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
CK PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}
  CollectiveKnowledge: L=-1 parent=None children=['Coding']
  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']
```

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```
