### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# 1. Delete VkbCli (the duplicate under SemanticAnalysis)\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/VkbCli?team=coding',\n    method='DELETE'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Delete VkbCli: {result}\")\n\n# 2. Update SemanticAnalysis to remove VkbCli from children\nsa_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Component',\n    'observations': [\"Semantic analysis pipeline for automated knowledge extraction from codebase changes\"],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 1,\n    'parentEntityName': 'Coding',\n    'isScaffoldNode': True,\n    'childEntityNames': ['<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>n', 'ComprehensiveSemanticAnalysis', 'CodingWorkflow', 'SemanticAnalysisWorkflowIssue', 'McpAgentDevelopmentPattern', 'Pipeline', 'Ontology', 'Insights']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/SemanticAnalysis',\n    data=sa_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Update SemanticAnalysis: {result}\")\n\n# Verify\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    print(f\"\\nTotal entities: {len(entities)}\")\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'SemanticAnalysis':\n            print(f\"SemanticAnalysis children: {e.get('childEntityNames', [])}\")\n        if 'kbCli' in e['entity_name'] or 'kbcli' in e['entity_name'].lower():\n            print(f\"Found: {e['entity_name']} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Delete duplicate VkbCli and update SemanticAnalysis children"
}

{
  "command": "curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50' | python3 -c \"\nimport sys, json\ndata = json.load(sys.stdin)\nentities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\nprint(f'Total: {len(entities)} entities\\n')\n\n# Group by hierarchy\nby_level = {}\nfor e in sorted(entities, key=lambda x: (x.get('hierarchyLevel') or 99, x.get('entity_name',''))):\n    hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n    name = e['entity_name']\n    etype = e.get('entity_type', '?')\n    parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n    children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n    obs = len(e.get('observations', []))\n    level_label = f'L{hl}' if hl is not None else 'L?'\n    indent = '  ' * max(0, (hl or 0) + 1)\n    print(f'{indent}{name} [{etype}] {level_label} (parent={parent}, {obs} obs, {len(children)} children)')\n\"",
  "description": "Show full hierarchy tree"
}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```

CK PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}
  CollectiveKnowledge: L=-1 parent=None children=['Coding']
  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']

  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# 1. Delete VkbCli (the duplicate under SemanticAnalysis)\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/VkbCli?team=coding',\n    method='DELETE'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Delete VkbCli: {result}\")\n\n# 2. Update SemanticAnalysis to remove VkbCli from children\nsa_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Component',\n    'observations': [\"Semantic analysis pipeline for automated knowledge extraction from codebase changes\"],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 1,\n    'parentEntityName': 'Coding',\n    'isScaffoldNode': True,\n    'childEntityNames': ['<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>n', 'ComprehensiveSemanticAnalysis', 'CodingWorkflow', 'SemanticAnalysisWorkflowIssue', 'McpAgentDevelopmentPattern', 'Pipeline', 'Ontology', 'Insights']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/SemanticAnalysis',\n    data=sa_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Update SemanticAnalysis: {result}\")\n\n# Verify\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    print(f\"\\nTotal entities: {len(entities)}\")\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'SemanticAnalysis':\n            print(f\"SemanticAnalysis children: {e.get('childEntityNames', [])}\")\n        if 'kbCli' in e['entity_name'] or 'kbcli' in e['entity_name'].lower():\n            print(f\"Found: {e['entity_name']} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Delete duplicate VkbCli and update SemanticAnalysis children"
}
```

  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

Delete VkbCli (the duplicate under SemanticAnalysis)\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/VkbCli?team=coding',\n    method='DELETE'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Delete VkbCli: {result}\")\n\n# 2. Update SemanticAnalysis to remove VkbCli from children\nsa_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Component',\n    'observations': [\"Semantic analysis pipeline for automated knowledge extraction from codebase changes\"],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 1,\n    'parentEntityName': 'Coding',\n    'isScaffoldNode': True,\n    'childEntityNames': ['<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>n', 'ComprehensiveSemanticAnalysis', 'CodingWorkflow', 'SemanticAnalysisWorkflowIssue', 'McpAgentDevelopmentPattern', 'Pipeline', 'Ontology', 'Insights']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/SemanticAnalysis',\n    data=sa_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Update SemanticAnalysis: {result}\")\n\n# Verify\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    print(f\"\\nTotal entities: {len(entities)}\")\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'SemanticAnalysis':\n            print(f\"SemanticAnalysis children: {e.get('childEntityNames', [])}\")\n        if 'kbCli' in e['entity_name'] or 'kbcli' in e['entity_name'].lower():\n            print(f\"Found: {e['entity_name']} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Delete duplicate VkbCli and update SemanticAnalysis children"
}

}

  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']

}

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
CK PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}
  CollectiveKnowledge: L=-1 parent=None children=['Coding']
  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']
```

Delete VkbCli (the duplicate under SemanticAnalysis)\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/VkbCli?team=coding',\n    method='DELETE'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Delete VkbCli: {result}\")\n\n# 2. Update SemanticAnalysis to remove VkbCli from children\nsa_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Component',\n    'observations': [\"Semantic analysis pipeline for automated knowledge extraction from codebase changes\"],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 1,\n    'parentEntityName': 'Coding',\n    'isScaffoldNode': True,\n    'childEntityNames': ['<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>n', 'ComprehensiveSemanticAnalysis', 'CodingWorkflow', 'SemanticAnalysisWorkflowIssue', 'McpAgentDevelopmentPattern', 'Pipeline', 'Ontology', 'Insights']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/SemanticAnalysis',\n    data=sa_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Update SemanticAnalysis: {result}\")\n\n# Verify\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    print(f\"\\nTotal entities: {len(entities)}\")\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'SemanticAnalysis':\n            print(f\"SemanticAnalysis children: {e.get('childEntityNames', [])}\")\n        if 'kbCli' in e['entity_name'] or 'kbcli' in e['entity_name'].lower():\n            print(f\"Found: {e['entity_name']} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Delete duplicate VkbCli and update SemanticAnalysis children"
}

}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']

}

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

{

Delete VkbCli (the duplicate under SemanticAnalysis)\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/VkbCli?team=coding',\n    method='DELETE'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Delete VkbCli: {result}\")\n\n# 2. Update SemanticAnalysis to remove VkbCli from children\nsa_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Component',\n    'observations': [\"Semantic analysis pipeline for automated knowledge extraction from codebase changes\"],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 1,\n    'parentEntityName': 'Coding',\n    'isScaffoldNode': True,\n    'childEntityNames': ['<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>n', 'ComprehensiveSemanticAnalysis', 'CodingWorkflow', 'SemanticAnalysisWorkflowIssue', 'McpAgentDevelopmentPattern', 'Pipeline', 'Ontology', 'Insights']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/SemanticAnalysis',\n    data=sa_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Update SemanticAnalysis: {result}\")\n\n# Verify\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    print(f\"\\nTotal entities: {len(entities)}\")\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'SemanticAnalysis':\n            print(f\"SemanticAnalysis children: {e.get('childEntityNames', [])}\")\n        if 'kbCli' in e['entity_name'] or 'kbcli' in e['entity_name'].lower():\n            print(f\"Found: {e['entity_name']} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Delete duplicate VkbCli and update SemanticAnalysis children"
}

{
  "command": "curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50' | python3 -c \"\nimport sys, json\ndata = json.load(sys.stdin)\nentities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\nprint(f'Total: {len(entities)} entities\\n')\n\n# Group by hierarchy\nby_level = {}\nfor e in sorted(entities, key=lambda x: (x.get('hierarchyLevel') or 99, x.get('entity_name',''))):\n    hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n    name = e['entity_name']\n    etype = e.get('entity_type', '?')\n    parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n    children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n    obs = len(e.get('observations', []))\n    level_label = f'L{hl}' if hl is not None else 'L?'\n    indent = '  ' * max(0, (hl or 0) + 1)\n    print(f'{indent}{name} [{etype}] {level_label} (parent={parent}, {obs} obs, {len(children)} children)')\n\"",
  "description": "Show full hierarchy tree"
}

  "description": "Test with non-zero hierarchyLevel value"
}

{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

CK PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}
  CollectiveKnowledge: L=-1 parent=None children=['Coding']
  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']

}

Delete VkbCli (the duplicate under SemanticAnalysis)\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/VkbCli?team=coding',\n    method='DELETE'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Delete VkbCli: {result}\")\n\n# 2. Update SemanticAnalysis to remove VkbCli from children\nsa_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Component',\n    'observations': [\"Semantic analysis pipeline for automated knowledge extraction from codebase changes\"],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 1,\n    'parentEntityName': 'Coding',\n    'isScaffoldNode': True,\n    'childEntityNames': ['<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>n', 'ComprehensiveSemanticAnalysis', 'CodingWorkflow', 'SemanticAnalysisWorkflowIssue', 'McpAgentDevelopmentPattern', 'Pipeline', 'Ontology', 'Insights']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/SemanticAnalysis',\n    data=sa_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Update SemanticAnalysis: {result}\")\n\n# Verify\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    print(f\"\\nTotal entities: {len(entities)}\")\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'SemanticAnalysis':\n            print(f\"SemanticAnalysis children: {e.get('childEntityNames', [])}\")\n        if 'kbCli' in e['entity_name'] or 'kbcli' in e['entity_name'].lower():\n            print(f\"Found: {e['entity_name']} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')}\")\nPYEOF",

}

{
  "command": "curl -s 'http://localhost:8080/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50' | python3 -c \"\nimport sys, json\ndata = json.load(sys.stdin)\nentities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\nprint(f'Total: {len(entities)} entities\\n')\n\n# Group by hierarchy\nby_level = {}\nfor e in sorted(entities, key=lambda x: (x.get('hierarchyLevel') or 99, x.get('entity_name',''))):\n    hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n    name = e['entity_name']\n    etype = e.get('entity_type', '?')\n    parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n    children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n    obs = len(e.get('observations', []))\n    level_label = f'L{hl}' if hl is not None else 'L?'\n    indent = '  ' * max(0, (hl or 0) + 1)\n    print(f'{indent}{name} [{etype}] {level_label} (parent={parent}, {obs} obs, {len(children)} children)')\n\"",
  "description": "Show full hierarchy tree"
}

}

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```
Coding PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'a18b4be8e3181ff4', 'message': 'Updated entity: Coding'}
CK PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}
  CollectiveKnowledge: L=-1 parent=None children=['Coding']
  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']
```

Delete VkbCli (the duplicate under SemanticAnalysis)\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/VkbCli?team=coding',\n    method='DELETE'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Delete VkbCli: {result}\")\n\n# 2. Update SemanticAnalysis to remove VkbCli from children\nsa_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Component',\n    'observations': [\"Semantic analysis pipeline for automated knowledge extraction from codebase changes\"],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 1,\n    'parentEntityName': 'Coding',\n    'isScaffoldNode': True,\n    'childEntityNames': ['<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>n', 'ComprehensiveSemanticAnalysis', 'CodingWorkflow', 'SemanticAnalysisWorkflowIssue', 'McpAgentDevelopmentPattern', 'Pipeline', 'Ontology', 'Insights']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/SemanticAnalysis',\n    data=sa_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Update SemanticAnalysis: {result}\")\n\n# Verify\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    print(f\"\\nTotal entities: {len(entities)}\")\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'SemanticAnalysis':\n            print(f\"SemanticAnalysis children: {e.get('childEntityNames', [])}\")\n        if 'kbCli' in e['entity_name'] or 'kbcli' in e['entity_name'].lower():\n            print(f\"Found: {e['entity_name']} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Delete duplicate VkbCli and update SemanticAnalysis children"
}

}

  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Step 1: Confirm current value is 99\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 1 (before): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\n\n# Step 2: Now set to 0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Step 2 PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Step 3: Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'Coding':\n            print(f\"Step 3 (after): hierarchyLevel={repr(e.get('hierarchyLevel'))}\")\n            break\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test transition from 99 to 0"
}
```

### Bash - 2026-03-04 07:04:47 UTC [08:04:47 CEST]

**System Action:** (Initiated automatically)

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport json, urllib.request\n\nVKB = 'http://localhost:8080'\n\n# Update Coding with hierarchyLevel=0\nupdate = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Project',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Main project for semantic analysis, knowledge management, and developer tooling\",\n        \"Contains: UKB pipeline, VKB viewer, MCP servers, Docker services, system health dashboard\",\n        \"Key paths: src/knowledge-management/, integrations/mcp-server-semantic-analysis/, lib/vkb-server/\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 0,\n    'parentEntityName': 'CollectiveKnowledge',\n    'childEntityNames': ['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/Coding',\n    data=update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Coding PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Update CollectiveKnowledge with hierarchyLevel=-1\nck_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'System',\n    'observations': [\n        \"Root of the knowledge graph - includes all project nodes\",\n        \"Central hub for high-value, transferable programming patterns\",\n        \"Contains only proven solutions applicable across multiple projects\",\n        \"Focus: architectural decisions, performance patterns, reusable designs\"\n    ],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': -1,\n    'childEntityNames': ['Coding']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/CollectiveKnowledge',\n    data=ck_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"CK PUT: {result}\")\n\n# Read back\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    for e in entities:\n        name = e['entity_name']\n        if name in ('Coding', 'CollectiveKnowledge'):\n            hl = e.get('hierarchyLevel')\n            parent = e.get('parentEntityName', '')\n            children = e.get('childEntityNames', [])\n            print(f\"  {name}: L={repr(hl)} parent={parent} children={children}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Test hierarchyLevel=0 after Docker rebuild"
}
```

CK PUT: {'success': True, 'id': 'fad7c7f7d36bba50', 'message': 'Updated entity: CollectiveKnowledge'}

  Coding: L=0 parent=CollectiveKnowledge children=['LiveLoggingSystem', 'LLMAbstraction', 'DockerizedServices', 'Trajectory', 'KnowledgeManagement', 'CodingPatterns', 'ConstraintSystem', 'SemanticAnalysis']

Update SemanticAnalysis to remove VkbCli from children\nsa_update = json.dumps({\n    'entityType': 'Component',\n    'observations': [\"Semantic analysis pipeline for automated knowledge extraction from codebase changes\"],\n    'team': 'coding',\n    'hierarchyLevel': 1,\n    'parentEntityName': 'Coding',\n    'isScaffoldNode': True,\n    'childEntityNames': ['<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>n', 'ComprehensiveSemanticAnalysis', 'CodingWorkflow', 'SemanticAnalysisWorkflowIssue', 'McpAgentDevelopmentPattern', 'Pipeline', 'Ontology', 'Insights']\n}).encode()\nreq = urllib.request.Request(\n    f'{VKB}/api/entities/SemanticAnalysis',\n    data=sa_update,\n    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},\n    method='PUT'\n)\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    result = json.loads(resp.read())\n    print(f\"Update SemanticAnalysis: {result}\")\n\n# Verify\nreq = urllib.request.Request(f'{VKB}/api/entities?team=coding&limit=50')\nwith urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:\n    data = json.loads(resp.read())\n    entities = data.get('entities', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data\n    print(f\"\\nTotal entities: {len(entities)}\")\n    for e in entities:\n        if e['entity_name'] == 'SemanticAnalysis':\n            print(f\"SemanticAnalysis children: {e.get('childEntityNames', [])}\")\n        if 'kbCli' in e['entity_name'] or 'kbcli' in e['entity_name'].lower():\n            print(f\"Found: {e['entity_name']} parent={e.get('parentEntityName')}\")\nPYEOF",
  "description": "Delete duplicate VkbCli and update SemanticAnalysis children"
}

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/memory-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>/GraphVisualization.tsx",
  "old_string": "      .attr('fill', (d) => {\n        // System and Project entities have fixed colors\n        if (d.entityType === 'System') return '#3cb371'; // Medium sea green\n        if (d.entityType === 'Project') return '#4682b4'; // Steel blue\n\n        // Pattern/knowledge nodes: batch=light blue, online=light red\n        const source = d.metadata?.source;\n        if (source === 'online') return '#FFB6C1'; // Light red\n        if (source === 'batch') return '#ADD8E6'; // Light blue\n\n        // Default\n        return '#69b3a2';\n      })",
  "new_string": "      .attr('fill', (d) => {\n        // System nodes: green\n        if (d.entityType === 'System') return '#3cb371';\n\n        // Hierarchy-based blue gradient: darker at stem, lighter at leaves\n        const hl = (d as any).hierarchyLevel;\n        if (hl != null) {\n          // L0 Project: darkest blue\n          if (hl === 0) return '#1565c0';\n          // L1 Component: medium-dark blue\n          if (hl === 1) return '#1e88e5';\n          // L2 SubComponent: medium-light blue\n          if (hl === 2) return '#64b5f6';\n          // L3+ leaf: lightest blue\n          return '#bbdefb';\n        }\n\n        // Fallback for entities without hierarchy\n        if (d.entityType === 'Project') return '#1565c0';\n        const source = (d as any).metadata?.source;\n        if (source === 'online') return '#FFB6C1';\n        return '#64b5f6';\n      })"
}
```

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/memory-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>/GraphVisualization.tsx",
  "old_string": "      .attr('fill', (d) => {\n        // System and Project entities have fixed colors\n        if (d.entityType === 'System') return '#3cb371'; // Medium sea green\n        if (d.entityType === 'Project') return '#4682b4'; // Steel blue\n\n        // Pattern/knowledge nodes: batch=light blue, online=light red\n        const source = d.metadata?.source;\n        if (source === 'online') return '#FFB6C1'; // Light red\n        if (source === 'batch') return '#ADD8E6'; // Light blue\n\n        // Default\n        return '#69b3a2';\n      })",
  "new_string": "      .attr('fill', (d) => {\n        // System nodes: green\n        if (d.entityType === 'System') return '#3cb371';\n\n        // Hierarchy-based blue gradient: darker at stem, lighter at leaves\n        const hl = (d as any).hierarchyLevel;\n        if (hl != null) {\n          // L0 Project: darkest blue\n          if (hl === 0) return '#1565c0';\n          // L1 Component: medium-dark blue\n          if (hl === 1) return '#1e88e5';\n          // L2 SubComponent: medium-light blue\n          if (hl === 2) return '#64b5f6';\n          // L3+ leaf: lightest blue\n          return '#bbdefb';\n        }\n\n        // Fallback for entities without hierarchy\n        if (d.entityType === 'Project') return '#1565c0';\n        const source = (d as any).metadata?.source;\n        if (source === 'online') return '#FFB6C1';\n        return '#64b5f6';\n      })"
}
```

### Edit - 2026-03-04 07:52:38 UTC [08:52:38 CEST]

**User Request:** choose a darker shade of blue for the 1st order children of a project node (in between the darkness of the project and the leaves) - so the nodes get lighter from the stem to the leaves of the tree.\
Also, it seems that, in each sub-node of project Coding you only added some banal one-liner observations. These now need to become way more explicit (several observations, detailed insight documents (md, puml/png), linked under "Detailed Insight", etc.). Also, Each first-order child needs to have more than the currently shown 2-3 sub-nodes... there are way more aspects to be listed here under "semantic analysis" than that it is a pipeline with insights!!! The agent system needs to operate in hieararchical waves: first wave determines the main building blocks of a project (eg. Coding) with a comprehensive summary and the main features as key observations. Then we need a sub-node for each observation... this one in itself could have yet another layer of detail (sub-sub-nodes) beneath it. Going from the stem to the leaves, information gets increasingly detailed... but, at each level, the whole sub-tree is fully described with "sufficient" detail to be useful at that level. Review and use gsd to make a plan of how to revamp the semantic analysis system to operate in such waves (as a true multi-agent system as opposed to just a DAG).

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>ns/memory-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>/GraphVisualization.tsx",
  "old_string": "      .attr('fill', (d) => {\n        // System nodes: green\n        if (d.entityType === 'System') return '#3cb371';\n\n        // Hierarchy-based blue gradient: darker at stem, lighter at leaves\n        const hl = (d as any).hierarchyLevel;\n        if (hl != null) {\n          // L0 Project: darkest blue\n          if (hl === 0) return '#1565c0';\n          // L1 Component: medium-dark blue\n          if (hl === 1) return '#1e88e5';\n          // L2 SubComponent: medium-light blue\n          if (hl === 2) return '#64b5f6';\n          // L3+ leaf: lightest blue\n          return '#bbdefb';\n        }\n\n        // Fallback for entities without hierarchy\n        if (d.entityType === 'Project') return '#1565c0';\n        const source = (d as any).metadata?.source;\n        if (source === 'online') return '#FFB6C1';\n        return '#64b5f6';\n      })",
  "new_string": "      .attr('fill', (d) => {\n        // System nodes: green\n        if (d.entityType === 'System') return '#3cb371';\n\n        // Hierarchy-based blue gradient: darker at stem, lighter at leaves\n        const hl = d.metadata?.hierarchyLevel;\n        if (hl != null) {\n          if (hl === 0) return '#1565c0'; // L0 Project: darkest blue\n          if (hl === 1) return '#1e88e5'; // L1 Component: medium-dark blue\n          if (hl === 2) return '#64b5f6'; // L2 SubComponent: medium-light blue\n          return '#bbdefb';               // L3+ leaf: lightest blue\n        }\n\n        // Fallback for entities without hierarchy\n        if (d.entityType === 'Project') return '#1565c0';\n        const source = d.metadata?.source;\n        if (source === 'online') return '#FFB6C1';\n        return '#64b5f6';\n      })"
}
```
